title: Send a message from a post-initiated direct chat
description: Verifies a user can send a text message after opening a post and the sent message appears in the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Open the Discovery Feed section
Open a post to start a direct chat
Fill a unique message into the message composer
Send the message
Verify the new message appears in the conversation thread

title: Send a text message in an existing chat
description: Verifies an authenticated user can select an existing chat, send a text message, and see the message appear with a delivery indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a chat in the chat sidebar
Fill a short message into the message composer
Send the message
Verify the new message appears in the conversation with a delivery status indicator

title: Complete onboarding profile and reach chat
description: Verifies an authenticated user can complete required profile details in onboarding and then land on chat with profile reflected.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a unique display name into the display name field
Select a role from the role control
Fill a short bio into the bio field
Submit the profile setup form
Verify the user lands on the chat dashboard
Verify the user profile information is shown in the chat experience

title: Send a media attachment in chat
description: Verifies an authenticated user can attach a media item in a chat message and see the attachment render in the conversation after sending.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a chat in the chat sidebar
Open the attachment picker in the message composer
Select a valid media item from the available picker options
Send the message
Verify a media attachment is displayed in the conversation for the newest message

title: Filter discovery feed by user and open a post to start a direct chat
description: Verifies a user can filter posts by a specific author and open a post to initiate a direct chat context.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Open the Discovery Feed section
Select a user in the feed filter control
Open a post from the filtered results
Verify a direct conversation view is opened or selected for messaging
Verify the chat composer is available for sending a message

title: Navigate from landing page to login
description: Verifies an anonymous visitor can reach the login page from the landing page and sees the login interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call-to-action to start account access
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: View a status update in the status viewer
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open a status from the status list and see its full content and author in the status viewer.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the Status tab in the main chat dashboard
Click a status item from the status list
Verify the status viewer shows the selected status content and author information

title: Prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the chat composer blocks sending when the message is empty and no new message is added to the thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click a chat in the chat sidebar
Clear the message composer so it is empty
Attempt to send the message
Verify an input validation state is shown and no new message is appended to the conversation

title: Prevent sending an empty message in chat composer
description: Verifies the chat composer blocks sending an empty message and provides an inline validation or disabled-send behavior.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /chat
Open any direct chat from the chat list
Clear the message composer so it is empty
Attempt to send the message
Verify no new message is added to the conversation thread

title: Browse challenges and open challenge details
description: Verifies an authenticated user can enter the challenges room, view active challenges, and open one to see its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the Challenges room in the main chat dashboard
Click an active challenge from the challenges list
Verify a challenge details view is displayed for the selected challenge

title: Onboarding blocks submission when required fields are missing
description: Verifies onboarding prevents submission when a required field is blank and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /onboarding
Fill a short bio into the bio field
Submit the profile setup form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the user remains in the onboarding flow
